title: SVN Commit
description: Schema representing an Apache Subversion commit (revision).

revision.description: The revision number created by this commit.

author.description: Username of the person who created this commit.

date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the commit was created.

message.description: The commit log message describing the changes.

changedPaths.description: List of paths changed in this commit.

action.description: Change action: A=Added, M=Modified, D=Deleted, R=Replaced

copyFromPath.description: If this path was copied, the source path.

copyFromRevision.description: If this path was copied, the source revision.
